title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
company_focus:
Building intelligent AI agents for customer engagement,
sales automation, knowledge management and workflow
optimization
description:
Company Description

We specialize in building intelligent AI agents that
transform the way businesses operate. Our focus is on
designing AI-driven solutions tailored to real-world use
cases across industries – from customer engagement and sales
automation to knowledge management and workflow
optimization.

Job Description

Job Overview We are seeking a highly skilled Senior AI
Engineer specializing in agent-based systems and advanced AI
architectures. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise
in designing scalable, production-grade multi-agent systems,
implementing advanced reasoning capabilities, and building
robust, secure, and intelligent AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

Architecture & System Design

- Designing multi-agent architectures (supervisor,
  hierarchical, collaborative patterns)
- Building fault-tolerant, production-grade agent systems with
  error recovery, fallback strategies, and human-in-the-loop
  escalation
- Architecting scalable RAG systems (hybrid search, query
  decomposition, agentic retrieval)
- Designing agent evaluation and benchmarking frameworks from
  scratch
- Security and safety patterns for autonomous agents
  (sandboxing, permission scoping, content filtering)

Advanced Agent Capabilities

- Complex workflow orchestration — agents that plan, delegate,
  self-correct, and iterate
- Multi-modal agent development (vision, audio, document
  understanding)
- Implementing advanced reasoning patterns (ReAct, reflection,
  tree-of-thought, self-critique loops)
- Building custom tool ecosystems — MCP servers, plugin
  architectures, dynamic tool selection
- Knowledge graph integration and structured knowledge
  management for agents
- Fine-tuning and distillation of models for domain-specific
  agent behaviors

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science,
  Artificial Intelligence, or a related field
- 2- 5 years of experience in AI/ML engineering, with a focus
  on LLMs or agent-based systems
- Strong experience in system design and scalable architecture
- Proficiency in Python and modern AI frameworks
- Hands-on experience with RAG pipelines and vector databases
- Familiarity with model fine-tuning, evaluation, and
  deployment

Additional Information

Why Join Us

- Work on cutting-edge AI agent technologies
- Opportunity to design next-generation intelligent systems
- Collaborative and innovation-driven environment
responsibilities: Design multi-agent architectures including supervisor, hierarchical, and collaborative patterns
Build fault-tolerant production-grade agent systems with error recovery, fallback strategies, and human-in-the-loop escalation
Architect scalable RAG systems with hybrid search, query decomposition, and agentic retrieval
Design agent evaluation and benchmarking frameworks from scratch
Implement advanced reasoning patterns including ReAct, reflection, tree-of-thought, and self-critique loops
Develop multi-modal agents with vision, audio, and document understanding capabilities

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly focused on building, designing, and
deploying AI agent systems. Key responsibilities include
designing multi-agent architectures, implementing advanced
reasoning patterns, fine-tuning models, and building
production-grade AI agent solutions with RAG systems.
